html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Clockwork Knight

Lucky Horseshoe is an item that is dropped by the Gilded Knight. When carrying it in the inventory, the Lucky Horseshoes can increase the player's Luck.

A single Lucky Horseshoe increases Luck by 0.05. The Year of the Clockwork Knight event triples the effect and if the player is wearing the Gilded Knight's Costume set, the number doubles. Combining both of the effects makes a single Lucky Horseshoe grant 0.3 Luck.

“It would behoove me to keep this.”
–Wilson
“Gimme all the luck!”
–Willow
“Lucky Wolfgang?”
–Wolfgang
“Will it make a difference for me?”
–Wendy
“SUPERSTITIOUS FLESHLINGS... MINE”
–WX-78
“This trinket confers a favorable advantage, yet its effect cannot be quantified.”
–Wickerbottom
“Of course you're more lucky, Luce!”
–Woodie
“Luck? Sure, why not?”
–Maxwell
“A warriör shapes her luck, yet spurning Ödin's favör is fölly.”
–Wigfrid
“It's lucky!”
–Webber
“I could use a little luck.”
–Warly
“What lucky?”
–Wormwood
“Where was this when I needed it?”
–Winona
“Could it be true? A lucky horseshoe?”
–Wortox
“Me best at luck, glurph.”
–Wurt
“Woby, you'll always be my good luck charm!”
–Walter
“A little luck never hurt.”
–Wanda
Lucky Horseshoe is an item that is dropped by the Gilded Knight. When carrying it in the inventory, the Lucky Horseshoes can increase the player's Luck.
A single Lucky Horseshoe increases Luck by 0.05. The Year of the Clockwork Knight event triples the effect and if the player is wearing the Gilded Knight's Costume set, the number doubles. Combining both of the effects makes a single Lucky Horseshoe grant 0.3 Luck.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Móng ngựa may mắn là một vật phẩm được Hiệp sĩ mạ vàng đánh rơi. Khi mang nó vào hành trang, Móng ngựa may mắn có thể tăng May mắn cho người chơi.

'''Lucky Horseshoe''' is an item that is dropped by the [[Gilded Knight]]. When carrying it in the inventory, the Lucky Horseshoes can increase the player's [[Luck]].

A single Lucky Horseshoe increases Luck by 0.05. The [[Year of the Clockwork Knight]] event triples the effect and if the player is wearing the [[Gilded Knight's Costume]] set, the number doubles. Combining both of the effects makes a single Lucky Horseshoe grant 0.3 Luck.
